subject: fix for the expiring cert
commit_message:
fix for the expiring cert

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1438
Change-Id: Icc0b84b7d8850ef4302643badbc351455f557979
Signed-off-by: su622b <su622b@att.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

tests are passing but I'm not sure how you solved it.
Can you just explain in comment?

Patch Set 1:

Not sure, when and how you tested. DMaaP Message Router cert in elalto charts expires on May 4 and it is causing communication issue between several components. We already have a discussion in onap-discuss about this issue.

https://lists.onap.org/g/onap-discuss/topic/74025042#20984

I already updated certs even before they expire, but I mapped to wrong folder. This fix addresses that issue.

Patch Set 1:

Issue reporter conformed that the issue resolved after applying the patch. Please review and merge the change.

https://lists.onap.org/g/onap-discuss/message/20995
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak
